subject: [PATCH v3 09/20] erofs: convert iomap ops to ->iomap_next()

2026-07-20.patch_summary: This patch converts the iomap operations in the erofs file system to use the new ->iomap_next() callback, which is generated using macros that wrap the iomap_iter_next helper. This change does not introduce any functional changes and is a conversion to the new API. The patch updates two files: data.c and zmap.c, replacing the old callbacks with the new ones.
